agreement.full_name: Agreement on SAARC Preferential Trading Arrangement

notes: CONFIRMED — this file has the genuine dual LDC/non-LDC column split described in the Loader Spec's 'Multi-country LDC/non-LDC' family (SAPTA/GSTP/PTN) — TWO separate tariff_rates rows should be created per line, one condition='non_ldc' from column F, one condition='ldc' from column G, per schema Section 5's design. Confirmed row 10 example: NLDC_Preferential_Rate is blank/None while LDC_Preferential_Rate=0 with remark 'LDC concession only' — meaning some lines are LDC-exclusive with no non-LDC concession at all (loader should create ONLY the ldc-condition rate row for such lines, not fabricate a non-existent non-LDC row). HS codes here ARE proper dotted HS format ('0301.91.10'), unlike GSTP/PTN's historical codes — standard HsCode::normalize() handling applies cleanly.
